description: Photo-and-headline composite graphic. The top half is a color photograph of Donald Trump in a navy suit and red tie, clapping, on a stage at a factory setting. Behind him stand rows of workers in orange high-visibility vests and hard hats, with American flags and large blue banners reading 'GOLDEN AGE' and 'AME...'. Below, large white italic and bold serif text reads 'America is WINNING!'. Beneath that are three white torn-paper headline strips with outlet mastheads: THE WALL STREET JOURNAL, 'Consumer-Confidence Survey Improved in July'; Bloomberg, 'US Consumer Confidence Rises on Outlook for Economy, Job Market'; and FOX Business, 'July tariff revenues break monthly record, with $150B collected so far in 2025'. The background is dark navy.
notable_text: America is WINNING!; Consumer-Confidence Survey Improved in July; US Consumer Confidence Rises on Outlook for Economy, Job Market; July tariff revenues break monthly record, with $150B collected so far in 2025
